title: HomeSweetHome
description: A feature-rich home management plugin with teleportation countdown, GUI interface, and configurable limits. Includes /home, /sethome, /bed commands and admin controls.
body:
# HomeSweetHome 🏠

**The ultimate home management plugin for your Minecraft server!**

HomeSweetHome provides players with a comprehensive and intuitive home system, featuring modern GUI interfaces, safety measures, and extensive administrative controls. Whether you're running a small survival server or a large multiplayer network, this plugin scales to meet your needs.

## ✨ Key Features

### 🏡 **Player Commands**
- **`/home`** - Teleport to your default home or open the GUI
- **`/home <name>`** - Teleport to a specific home
- **`/sethome <name>`** - Set a new home at your current location
- **`/delhome <name>`** - Delete an existing home
- **`/homes`** - List all your homes
- **`/bed`** - Quick teleport to your spawn point
- **`/homegui`** - Open the beautiful graphical interface

### 🎮 **Intuitive GUI Interface**
- **Bed icon at the top** for quick spawn teleportation
- **Visual home icons** with easy navigation
- **Right-click to delete** homes with confirmation
- **Pagination support** for players with many homes
- **Custom item representations** based on your preferences

### ⏱️ **Safe Teleportation System**
- **3-second countdown** before teleportation
- **Movement cancellation** - moving during countdown cancels teleport
- **Damage cancellation** - taking damage cancels teleport
- **Safe location checks** to prevent suffocation
- **Configurable cooldowns** between teleports
- **Sound effects** and visual feedback

### 🔧 **Administrative Controls**
- **`/homeadmin tp <player> <home>`** - Teleport to any player's home
- **`/homeadmin list <player>`** - View another player's homes
- **`/homeadmin delete <player> <home>`** - Remove player homes
- **`/homeadmin reload`** - Reload configuration without restart
- **`/homeadmin info <player>`** - Display player home statistics

### 📊 **Flexible Configuration**
- **Configurable home limits** (default: 6 homes per player)
- **Permission-based limits** - grant different amounts to different groups
- **Unlimited homes** for operators and specific permissions
- **World restrictions** - disable homes in certain worlds
- **Customizable messages** and GUI elements
- **Economy integration** support (optional)

### 🗃️ **Organized Storage**
- **Clean folder structure** for easy server management
- **Individual player files** for organized data storage
- **SQLite database option** for high-performance servers
- **Automatic backups** to prevent data loss
- **Easy data migration** between storage types

## 🛡️ **Permissions System**

### Player Permissions
- `homesweethome.home` - Use home commands
- `homesweethome.sethome` - Set home locations
- `homesweethome.bed` - Use bed teleportation
- `homesweethome.gui` - Access home GUI
- `homesweethome.unlimited` - Unlimited homes
- `homesweethome.homes.<number>` - Specific home limits (5, 10, 25, etc.)

### Admin Permissions
- `homesweethome.admin.*` - All administrative permissions
- `homesweethome.admin.tp` - Teleport to other player homes
- `homesweethome.admin.delete` - Delete other player homes
- `homesweethome.admin.bypass.cooldown` - Skip teleport cooldowns

## ⚙️ **Configuration Highlights**

```yaml
settings:
  teleport-delay: 3          # Countdown in seconds
  teleport-cooldown: 5       # Cooldown between teleports
  default-max-homes: 6       # Default home limit
  cancel-on-move: true       # Cancel on movement
  cancel-on-damage: true     # Cancel on damage
  safe-teleport: true        # Safety checks
```

## 🔌 **Integration Support**
- **Vault** - Economy integration for paid teleports/homes
- **WorldGuard** - Region compatibility and restrictions  
- **PlaceholderAPI** - Custom placeholders for other plugins
- **Multiple storage backends** - YAML files or SQLite database

## 📋 **Requirements**
- **Minecraft Version:** 1.16+
- **Server Software:** Bukkit, Spigot, Paper (recommended)
- **Java Version:** 11+
- **Optional Dependencies:** Vault, WorldGuard, PlaceholderAPI

## 🚀 **Why Choose HomeSweetHome?**

- **User-friendly** - Intuitive commands and beautiful GUI interface
- **Highly configurable** - Customize everything to fit your server
- **Performance optimized** - Async operations and efficient data handling
- **Admin-friendly** - Comprehensive management tools and permissions
- **Safe & reliable** - Built-in safety checks and data backup systems
- **Modern codebase** - Clean, maintainable code following best practices

---

**Transform your server's home system today with HomeSweetHome!** 🏡✨
